summary.summary: Imported via zip fallback, file count: 8380

core_modules.description: Primary ingestion layer for many neurophysiology formats (FIF, EDF/BDF/GDF, BrainVision, EEGLAB, CTF, KIT, etc.) and core continuous-data object model.
Event-locked segmentation and trial-level preprocessing/statistics container.
Averaged responses and operations for ERP/ERF-style analysis.
Artifact handling and denoising pipeline components (ICA/SSP/Maxwell/filtering helpers).
Time-frequency and spectral analysis primitives used throughout examples/tutorials.
Visualization APIs (2D/3D) including browser and source-space rendering backends.

cli_commands.name: mne
cli_commands.description: Top-level CLI dispatcher exposing MNE command suite.
